code:
import io
import string
import list

let content = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split(content, "\n")
let n = list.len(parts)
mut count = n
if n > 0
  match list.get(parts, n - 1)
  when Some(last)
    if string.is_empty(last)
      count = n - 1
    end
  when None
    count = n
  end
end
mut i = 0
while i < count
  match list.get(parts, i)
  when Some(line)
    println("[#{i}] #{line}")
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
